description: Wrapped MainLayout in ProtectedRoute to enforce user authentication on dashboard and other subpages, enabling automatic redirect on logout. Updated backend /logout route to decode user ID from Authorization access token or body refresh token so that logout events are properly tracked.

Rewrote useCamera hook to track active stream acquisition promise and reference count globally. This resolves the StrictMode double-mount lock issue where the camera stream would leak and the active hook instance would remain without a stream. Synchronized FaceCamera's local state with autoCapture updates.

Sanitized base64 frames and stripped data URI scheme prefixes in BootstrapSetupPage.tsx before sending payload to bootstrap API. Added sanitize_base64_frame helper function in face-ai-service/src/app.py and sanitized frames in /api/face-login and /api/register-face routes.

Executed Jest unit tests (102 tests passed across 13 test suites) in backend-api, ran frontend production tsc & vite builds successfully, and verified system-wide build parameters with verify-build.js.
